biological_replicate: To investigate the effects of treatment with MC2494 on overall mitochondrial protein profile, we used the U937 cell line...
technical_replicate: treated, in triplicate, with MC2494 at 50, 25, 12.5, 6.25, 3.125 1.625, and 0.81 μM concentration for 24 h
experimental_design: A comparative proteomic analysis was performed on treated and untreated U937 cells.
number_of_fractions: present in at least two out of three injections
number_of_biological_replicates: Each experiment was performed in biological triplicates and values expressed as mean ± SD.
